[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001 4
1 0111100 4
2 0110100 3
3 0011111 5
4 1111001 5
5 1000001 2
6 1111111 a
7 1000101 3

01 10 1011001 4 match 0
12 21 1111101 6
23 32 1111100 5
34 43 1100110 4
45 54 1000111 4
56 65 1100101 4
67 76 0111101 5
70 07 1111001 5 match 4

02 20 1111100 5
13 31 1111101 6
24 42 1111110 6
35 53 1100101 4
46 64 1100111 5
57 75 1111101 6
60 06 1110101 5
71 17 1111001 5 match 4

36 63 1100101 4
47 74 1111111 a match 6
50 05 1010101 4
61 16 1111101 6
72 27 0111101 5

15 51 1011101 5
26 62 0111101 5
37 73 1111101 6
